# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Flexible Build & Deploy on Self-Hosted

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_commands:
        description: 'Custom shell commands for the build process'
        required: false
        default: |
          echo "--- No specific build commands provided. Add your build logic here. ---"
          # Example:
          # npm install
          # npm run build
          # make all
      deploy_commands:
        description: 'Custom shell commands for the deployment process'
        required: false
        default: |
          echo "--- No specific deployment commands provided. Add your deployment logic here. ---"
          # Example:
          # rsync -avz --delete dist/ user@your-server:/var/www/my-app/
          # ssh user@your-server "sudo systemctl restart my-service"

jobs:
  run-custom-scripts:
    runs-on: self-hosted

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Execute Custom Build Commands
        run: |
          ${{ github.event.inputs.build_commands }}

      - name: Execute Custom Deployment Commands
        run: |
          ${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_commands }}
